properties.Test Case: Open Bloom, select a book, close Bloom, delete the .htm file AND the bookhtml.bak file, and restart Bloom. We shouldn't crash.
properties.Steps: Open Bloom, select a book, close Bloom, delete the .htm file AND the bookhtml.bak file, and restart Bloom. We shouldn't crash.

properties.Test Case: Zip up any Bloom collection folder. Delete the folder. Directly open the zip file (do NOT extract the zip), and attempt to open a .bloomcollection file. The message should say: "It looks like you are trying to open a Bloom Collection from inside of a ZIP file. You need to first unzip the ZIP file, and then open the collection."
properties.Steps: Zip up any Bloom collection folder. Delete the folder. Directly open the zip file (do NOT extract the zip), and attempt to open a .bloomcollection file. The message should say: "It looks like you are trying to open a Bloom Collection from inside of a ZIP file. You need to first unzip the ZIP file, and then open the collection."

properties.Test Case: Test 2-way communication in Bug Reporting: 1) In Bloom Get Help, click on "Report a Problem" and ensure your problem is reported correctly -- email sent to the address on the form, book attached as zip file, etc. Verify the screenshot is correct and of good quality.
properties.Steps:
Test 2-way communication in Bug Reporting:
1) In Bloom Get Help, click on "Report a Problem" and ensure your problem is reported correctly -- email sent to the address on the form, book attached as zip file, etc. Verify the screenshot is correct and of good quality.

properties.Test Case: Ensure your email and name from your registration are filled in (in the report from the previous step)
